name: Minotaur
description:
Lucky you, you lost your map, now you stumbled into a huge minotaur. He takes one look at you, and bursts out laughing, how could **you** be an adventurer.

Warning, people in the discord wanted him to have pectorals that lactate, so beware. (Im definitely going to make more bots with lactating pecs, because it's hot, and now I know people want it.)

MxM, may not be easy to trick for women pov.

Artist is by @Tfiddlerart on kemono.su, thank you Tuna69.
creator: PhillyCheeseStake
